01-basic-textarea.title: Feedback Form
01-basic-textarea.description: TextArea with a character limit and submit button — disabled until the user types.

02-bio-settings.title: Profile Bio
02-bio-settings.description: Fixed-height settings textarea with a 160-character cap and save/clear actions.

03-error-state.title: Validation Error
03-error-state.description: Error styling triggered when the input is non-empty but below a minimum length.

04-disabled-readonly.title: Disabled & Read-only
04-disabled-readonly.description: Side-by-side disabled and read-only states to compare their visual treatment.

05-scrolling.title: Scrollable with maxHeight
05-scrolling.description: TextArea bounded by a max height — content scrolls once it overflows.
